scoringPlays.text: Zavion Thomas 1 Yd pass from Michael Van Buren Jr. (Damian Ramos Kick)
Deion Burks 45 Yd pass from John Mateer (Tate Sandell Kick)
Isaiah Sategna III 58 Yd pass from John Mateer (Tate Sandell Kick)

videos.headline: LSU Tigers vs. Oklahoma Sooners: Full Highlights
videos.description: LSU Tigers vs. Oklahoma Sooners: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU Tigers vs. Oklahoma Sooners: Full Highlights) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: John Mateer's late TD pass leads No. 8 Sooners over LSU
videos.description: Mateer throws a 58-yard touchdown pass to Isaiah Sategna with 4:16 left to overcome three interceptions, and No. 8 Oklahoma beat the Tigers, 17-13, to likely wrap up a College Football Playoff spot.

videos.headline: Peyton Bowen picks off Michael Van Buren Jr. in the end zone
videos.description: Peyton Bowen makes a nice interception in the end zone to give the ball back to Oklahoma.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Peyton Bowen picks off Michael Van Buren Jr. in the end zone) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Tate Sandell makes 38-yard field goal) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: John Mateer gets picked off by A.J. Haulcy
videos.description: A.J. Haulcy intercepts John Mateer's pass to give the ball back to LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (John Mateer gets picked off by A.J. Haulcy) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU goes ahead on a a Van Buren-Thomas connection
videos.description: Zavion Thomas hauls in a pass from Michael Van Buren Jr. to break the tie and put LSU on top.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU goes ahead on a a Van Buren-Thomas connection) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Pickett intercepts John Mateer
videos.description: John Mateer throws his second pick of the third quarter to give the ball back to LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Pickett intercepts John Mateer) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: John Mateer and Deion Burks connect for a 45-yard TD
videos.description: Oklahoma ties the score in the third quarter on a John Mateer and Deion Burks connection.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (John Mateer and Deion Burks connect for a 45-yard TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Damian Ramos kicks 43-yard field goal) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: John Mateer connects with Isaiah Sategna III to give Oklahoma the lead
videos.description: John Mateer finds a wide open Isaiah Sategna III for a 58-yard touchdown to put the Sooners on top.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (John Mateer connects with Isaiah Sategna III to give Oklahoma the lead) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
